title: cenchrus nodiflorus
intro: Cenchrus nodiflorus, also known as common sandbur or cocklebur, is a perennial weed plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is widely distributed in tropical, subtropical, and warm temperate regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus nodiflorus include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal purposes.
